nav.waitingClientTip: Waiting for you to open the LoL client

rules.enemyPokeSiege: Buy wards and avoid long lane fights. Force short all-ins before their poke stacks up.
rules.enemyEngageFrontBack: Position behind your frontline. If they engage on you first, their comp wins the fight. Wait out their CDs.
rules.enemyPickBurst: Never walk to wards alone. They pick off any unescorted carry. Group from minutes 14-30.
rules.enemyScalingLate: You're stronger now. Force objectives and skirmishes BEFORE minute 25. Late-game = you lose.
rules.enemyEarlySkirmish: Their comp peaks at 5-15min. Play the first wave safe, dodge ganks, wait for mid-game.
rules.enemySplit14: Watch the enemy side-laner. Ping MIA when they vanish. Your team must force a 4v4 mid.
rules.allyScalingLate: Your team scales. Losing lane under control > dying to win it. Stack farm + CS until minute 25.
rules.allyEngageHard: Your team has hard engage. Ping to force fights at objectives. Don't waste it on skirmishes.
rules.allySplitPush: Push the side opposite objectives. Create 1-3-1 pressure. Your team wins by soaking TP/ult.
rules.dmgApVsAd: Enemy comp is AP-heavy, you're AD-heavy. Your Support/Tank should buy Mercurial/Wit's End. Coordinate MR early.
rules.dmgAdVsAp: Enemy team is AD-heavy. Ally tank buys Plated/Randuin. Build situational armor if you're squishy.
rules.trueDmg: Multiple enemies deal true damage — raw HP won't save you. Mix HP + resistances + escapes.
rules.myHypercarry: {{name}} is a hypercarry. Your team must peel for you. Ask for peel and stay back in teamfights.
rules.myLongRangeVsDive: Their comp has dive — ward the river + buy Stopwatch/QSS. Their main CD = your fight window.
rules.defaultMixed: Balanced comp. Play objectives: Dragon stack > Baron tempo > close with Soul/Elder.
rules.roleJungleScaling: Jungle: track their jungler and farm safe — don't force ganks that delay your team's scaling.
rules.roleJungleEarly: Jungle: their comp fights early — live in the lanes, counter-gank and deny their tempo.
rules.roleJungleDefault: Jungle: you set the objective tempo — pair each dragon spawn with lane priority.
rules.roleSupportPick: Support: your vision breaks their picks — ward flanks and rivers BEFORE every objective.
rules.roleSupportEngage: Support: you have engage — look for the first pick at objectives, not in an empty lane.
rules.roleSupportDefault: Support: you win the map with vision — control ward every recall and clear theirs.
rules.roleMidPoke: Mid: shove waves to steal tempo and roam when they push your tower.
rules.roleMidDefault: Mid: after shoving, roam with priority to side/objectives — your impact is on the map.
rules.roleAdcDive: ADC: positioning is everything vs their dive/pick — don't give flanks and save a defensive summoner for fights.
rules.roleAdcDefault: ADC: find your damage zone every fight — deal damage from the last safe position.
rules.roleTopDive: Top: hold TP to flank fights — your biggest impact is rotating with TP, not getting isolated.
rules.roleTopDefault: Top: choose split or group based on the objective — call TP before every dragon/Baron.

trends.title: Trends
trends.emptyDetail: You need at least 6 matches with the current filters. Keep playing and come back.
trends.leakHeadlineMacro: Your mechanical stats don't separate your wins from your losses — the leak is macro/draft, not mechanics. ({{wr}}% WR over {{games}})
trends.leakHeadlineMetric: Your biggest difference between winning and losing: {{label}}. ({{wr}}% WR over {{games}})

leakAdvice.deaths: Before each fight, weigh whether the trade is worth it. Check the minimap after every recall.
leakAdvice.kda: Pick your fights better: only join when you can impact without dying.
leakAdvice.cspm: Prioritize last-hits and pick waves back up after objectives instead of roaming for nothing.
leakAdvice.kp: Get closer to objectives and rotations — in your losses you play isolated from the team.
leakAdvice.vision: Buy control wards, ward before objectives and clear enemy vision.
leakAdvice.gold: Grow your economy: don't lose waves and grab plates / objectives so you don't fall behind on items.

liveCoach.deathsCritical: You're dying too much ({{k}}/{{d}}/{{a}}). Prioritize NOT dying over getting kills.
liveCoach.deathsWarn: You die more than you contribute ({{k}}/{{d}}/{{a}}). Play safe and farm.
liveCoach.lowHp: HP at {{hp}}%: retreat or recall, avoid trades.
liveCoach.laneBehind: You're {{diff}} CS vs {{champ}}. Farm safe under tower and pick waves back up.
liveCoach.laneAhead: You're +{{diff}} CS vs {{champ}}. Convert the lead: roam or take an objective.
liveCoach.lvlBehind: −{{levels}} levels vs {{champ}}. Don't give up XP, stay in the wave.
liveCoach.csPace: Low farm: {{cs}} CS in {{min}}min (~{{expected}} expected). Pick waves back up between plays.
liveCoach.objBaron: Baron in {{eta}}s: place vision NOW and don't facecheck the pit.
liveCoach.objDragon: Dragon in {{eta}}s: push your wave and ward the river.
liveCoach.soulDeny: Enemy is 1 dragon from SOUL. Deny the next dragon at all costs.
liveCoach.soulTake: 1 dragon from SOUL. Force the next one with vision and wave priority.
liveCoach.baronEnemy: Enemy has Baron ({{sec}}s). Don't fight in the open; defend under towers.
liveCoach.baronMine: You have Baron ({{sec}}s). Push lanes with the wave and close the map.
liveCoach.spikeStrong: Power spike ({{rating}}/10): force fights and objectives now.
liveCoach.spikeWeak: Weak right now ({{rating}}/10): {{summary}}. Play safe until your spike.
liveCoach.recall: You have {{gold}} unspent gold. Recall in the next wave window.

runeAdvice.apHeavy: AP-heavy comp: MR shard (row 3) instead of armor.
runeAdvice.adHeavy: AD-heavy comp: armor shard; Bone Plating/Second Skin if they all-in you.
runeAdvice.poke: Lots of poke: Second Wind + HP shard to sustain before fighting.
runeAdvice.ccHeavy: Heavy CC: Tenacity — Mercurial or the Unflinching rune so you're not chain-locked.
runeAdvice.balanced: Balanced comp: keep the standard page; tune shards to your lane matchup.

aram.poke: Poke: punish from range and farm damage before fighting; don't dive without your combo up.
aram.marksman: Position behind the frontline. With no recall, prioritize sustain (Shieldbow/ER) over glass-cannon.
aram.fighter: You're the frontline: soak the poke and look for the all-in when the enemy spends abilities.
aram.tank: Engage when they waste their poke. Buy resistances + anti-heal if they have healing.
aram.assassin: Wait for flanks; don't expose yourself to constant poke. One clean pick wins the teamfight.
aram.support: Maximize peel/shields and CC in teamfights — ward value doesn't exist here.
aram.universalSustain: No recall: use the Health Relic + poros to sustain. Push to pressure the tower.
aram.universalTenacity: Buy Tenacity (Mercurial/Sterak) vs heavy CC and anti-heal early if the enemy heals.

build.copyTitle: Copy the whole build to the clipboard for Discord
build.toastCopiedDetail: Paste it in Discord or wherever you want to share it.
build.countersLive: Live counters · based on enemy items
build.spellsNotInChampSelect: Make sure you're in champ select.

build.proBuildsEmpty: No recent pro games for this champion in {{role}}.

note.smurf: Possible smurf (lvl {{level}}). Assume they dominate the matchup — play safe.
note.smurfWr: Possible smurf (lvl {{level}}, {{wr}}% WR). Assume they dominate the matchup — play safe.
note.oneTrick: {{champ}} OTP ({{pts}}k). Don't fight the early 1v1; ask for jungle.
note.hotStreak: On a hot streak ({{wr}}%). Confident — punish their overextends.
note.offPool: Off their champ pool. Pressure early before they settle in.
note.coldStreak: Out of form. Snowball your lane, they may tilt.
note.coldStreakWr: Out of form ({{wr}}%). Snowball your lane, they may tilt.
note.main: Playing their main ({{champ}}). Respect their power picks.
note.standard: Standard opponent. Execute your lane plan.

summary.safe: No clear threats — execute your plan.
summary.threats_one: {{count}} threat: play safe and coordinate against them.
summary.threats_other: {{count}} threats: play safe and coordinate against them.

coach.apiKeyHint: Paste your API key ({{provider}}) in Prefs. Groq is free.

farming.critical: CS below target. Last wave before roams + freeze after kills. Stack waves before chasing objectives.
farming.needsWork: Raise your CS/min. Every 10 CS = ~700 gold. Spot missed waves and fix sub-optimal last-hits.

vision.critical: Wards too low. Buy Stealth/Pink every back. Ward objectives 30s before spawn (Dragon/Baron).
vision.needsWork: More preventive vision. Ward the entries to your lane before each enemy gank window.

aggression.critical: Few kills/assists. You forced too few trades. Find power spikes and move to other lanes with priority.
aggression.needsWork: More team participation. Track enemy ults and collapse when your lane is safe.

survivability.critical: Too many deaths. Track junglers + enemy ults. Ping MIA and respect vision when ahead.
survivability.needsWork: Cut deaths. Ward before pushing. If the jungler is gone 60s = possible gank.

objectives.critical: Few objectives secured. Position for the Dragon/Baron timer. Smite advantage + vision = winning pit fight.
objectives.needsWork: More objective priority. Each Dragon = permanent stats. Coordinate back-timings with your team.

versatility.critical: Champ pool too narrow. Learn 2-3 more in your role to counter-pick and dodge hostile bans.
versatility.needsWork: Decent but narrow pool. Add 1 more pick per archetype (tank/bruiser/AP) for flex.

laning.critical: You clearly lost lane. Respect the matchup, farm under tower and ask for ganks instead of forcing losing trades.
laning.needsWork: Draw or win your lane. Improve wave management and punish the enemy's CDs for an early edge.

lobby.title: Lobby scout
lobby.carryReason: {{stat}} — your win condition, play around them.
lobby.liabilitySmall: {{stat}} — small sample / possible autofill, don't rely on them.
lobby.liabilityForm: {{stat}} — out of form, don't rely on them.
lobby.topThreatReason: {{stat}} — biggest enemy threat, respect their lane.
lobby.balanceAhead: You outrank the enemy — press early, force your edge.
lobby.balanceBehind: The enemy outranks you — play safe, group and play objectives.
lobby.balanceEven: Teams even in rank — draft and execution decide.
lobby.dodgeText: Uphill game ({{bits}}). Consider dodging: sometimes -LP is cheaper than a likely loss.

glossary.GPI: Gameplay Performance Index. A 0-100 score combining farm, vision, aggression, survivability, objectives and versatility.
glossary.KDA: Kills + Assists ÷ Deaths. >2 is decent, >4 is excellent.
glossary.CS: Creep Score. Minions and monsters killed. Drives the gold available for items.
glossary.CSPM: CS per minute. Diamond average: top 7, jungle 5.5, mid 7.5, ADC 8.
glossary.KP: Kill Participation. % of your team's kills you took part in. >55% in SoloQ is good.
glossary.LP: League Points. The scoring system within each division.
glossary.Vision: Vision Score. Combines wards placed, control wards bought and enemy wards destroyed. >1/min is good.
glossary.Counter: How a champion fares against another in historical stats.
glossary.Synergy: Compatibility between two champions on the same team.
glossary.Mastery: Mastery level with a champion (1-7). M5+ implies solid knowledge. >100k pts is 'main', >200k 'one-trick'.
glossary.Hotstreak: 4 wins in a row or more. Riot flags it as a 'hot-streak player'.

settings.title: Settings
settings.updateChannelHint: Stable = official releases only. Beta = pre-releases for early testers (more bugs, new features sooner). Default Stable.
settings.metaSoloqDone: SoloQ meta synced ✓ (reload the app to use it)
settings.syncingMultiRegion: Multi-region KR + EUW + NA (this takes ~30 min)...
settings.proMetaDone: Pro meta synced ✓ {{games}} pro matches · {{rows}} champ/role entries. Reload.
settings.clientNotOpen: Client not open. Open LoL first.
settings.openClientRetry: Open the LoL client and retry — without LCU or proxy/key I can't sync
settings.autoModeBody: With the LoL client open, the app detects your account and matches automatically. You don't need to do anything else.
settings.autoModeProxyPrefix: Want enemy scout, player lookup and multi-region meta without renewing a key every 24h? Set up a
settings.advancedBody: Only needed for: enemy scout in champ select, global meta aggregation, and using the app without the client open.
settings.apiKeyHint: Only needed if you DON'T use the proxy. Dev keys expire in 24h. Personal application keys (PAK) last ~1 year.
settings.apiKeyWarningSuffix: . Check you copied the right one (not the Groq one).
settings.regionHint: The Riot server where your account is. EUW for Western Europe, NA for North America, KR for Korea, etc. Determines where your matches are looked up.
settings.riotIdHint: Your full Riot name: Faker#KR1, SummonerName#EUW, etc. The number/letters after # is the tag. Find it in the LoL client → top-right of your profile.
settings.resyncTooltip: Deletes and re-downloads your matches (useful after updating the app)
settings.syncProTooltip: Downloads the latest LCK/LEC/LCS/LPL matches from Leaguepedia (no key)
settings.syncMetaTooltip: Adds Master+ SoloQ to the meta database
settings.needKeyOrProxy: Needs a Riot API key or configured proxy
settings.multiRegionTooltip: KR + EUW + NA. Takes ~30 min, max data quality
settings.needKeyOrProxyShort: Needs a Riot API key or proxy
settings.completeRiotId: Fill in Riot ID + tag above
settings.saveSyncTooltip: Validates your account and syncs your history
settings.resyncConfirmMsg: This deletes all your locally-saved matches and re-downloads the history from Riot. Your Riot account isn't touched. May take a few minutes.
settings.proxyActiveBodyPrefix: Features that need the Riot API work without you configuring a key. The proxy

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.disableAllTitle: Turns off auto-apply for runes, spells, item sets and on-hover. Doesn't touch the UI or any data.
preferences.confirmResetMsg: This clears your toggles, API keys, meta prefs and theme. Your match history and personal data are NOT touched. This can't be undone.

tabs.buildEmpty: Lock your champion to see build, runes and tips.

stored.title: What do we store?
stored.detail: Everything in local SQLite. Your match data never leaves this PC.
stored.identity: Your PUUID and Riot ID (only to identify you to the Riot API)
stored.apiKeys: API keys you enter (Riot/Anthropic) — never shared

notStored.title: What we DON'T store
notStored.chatLogs: AI Coach chat logs (ephemeral, in memory)
notStored.otherPlayers: Other players' info beyond the temporary scout

egress.title: What DOES leave your PC
egress.detail: Only this, and you can turn it off:
egress.crashReports: Anonymous crash reports (Sentry), no personal data — opt-out in Settings
egress.proxy: Riot API calls via the Cloudflare proxy (only if you enable proxy mode)
egress.aiProviders: Your AI Coach messages go to the provider you pick (Groq/Anthropic/Gemini) when you use it

backups.title: Automatic backups
backups.detail: Rolling daily snapshot (last 5 days) created on every launch BEFORE any SQL migration.
backups.empty: No snapshots yet. They'll appear after the next launch.

actions.title: Actions
actions.exportPrefsKeysTitle: Includes your real API keys — for personal backup only, do NOT share

confirm.clearMatchesMsg: You're about to delete {{n}} locally saved matches. This can't be undone. Your Riot account and the LoL client are not touched.
confirm.resetPrefsMsg: You'll lose ALL your local settings (toggles, AI keys, layout). Match data in SQLite is not touched. The app will restart to apply.

usePersonalStats.label: My personal winrate per champion
usePersonalStats.detail: Uses your real games to score champions you're good at

useMastery.label: My masteries
useMastery.detail: Bumps champions with mastery 5+ up the ranking

useMetaTier.label: Global meta tier list
useMetaTier.detail: Master+ match data (sync in ⚙ > Sync meta)

safeMode.label: Safe mode (disables all automatic actions)
safeMode.detail: Read-only. You make every click. The most conservative option re: Riot's ToS.

beginnerMode.label: Beginner mode
beginnerMode.detail: More explanations, tooltips and the reasons behind each suggestion.

showRuneImportButton.label: Show the 'Apply runes to client' button

autoApplyRunes.label: Apply runes on lock-in
autoApplyRunes.detail: Automatically applies the recommended runes when you lock your pick

autoApplyOnHover.label: Apply runes on hover (intent)
autoApplyOnHover.detail: Applies runes as soon as you set intent, before lock

showSpellImportButton.label: Show the 'Apply spells to client' button

autoApplySpells.label: Apply spells on lock-in
autoApplySpells.detail: Overwrites your summoner spells with the recommended ones on lock

autoApplyItemSet.label: Push item set to client (visible in the in-game shop)
autoApplyItemSet.detail: Adds a 'Draftboard' item set to your account with starter/boots/core/situational on lock. Doesn't delete your other sets.

notifyOnEnemyHotStreak.label: Warn when an enemy is on a hot streak

coachAfterMatch.label: Open the coach automatically after a match

liveTimer.label: Show the champ-select timer in the header

showInGameOverlay.label: Transparent in-game overlay (experimental)
showInGameOverlay.detail: Always-on-top window with a live coach (soul/baron/deaths/HP), scores, objectives and timers. Only appears during real games. Experimental: position and click-through are still being tuned — enable it to try it in a game.

telemetryEnabled.label: Send anonymous error reports (Sentry)
telemetryEnabled.detail: Crashes and error traces only — no names, no chat, no matches. Helps fix bugs fast. GDPR-compliant.

voiceCoachEnabled.label: Voice announcements in draft
voiceCoachEnabled.detail: The browser's TTS announces recommended bans, strong picks and enemies on a streak.

aiCoachEnabled.label: Enable AI Coach
aiCoachEnabled.detail: Natural LLM analysis. Groq by default (free). Set the key below.

competitive.label: Competitive

silent.label: Silent

draftCoach.tooltip: The AI explains your pick + the matchup + how to play it

liveTimers.heading: Objectives · timers
liveTimers.wardTip: Ward the river 30s before spawn. Push side waves first.

firstItem.label: 1 item
firstItem.tip: With the first core item complete

summary.Yasuo: Weak until IE+PD, monster with 2 crit items
summary.Yone: Strong spike with IE; abuse him before
summary.Zed: Spikes at level 6, full pressure with first item
summary.Akali: Spikes with first item complete, weak pre-6
summary.Katarina: Brutal snowball off one kill, weak without it
summary.Veigar: Hyperscaler — survive and you will see a 10/10 late
summary.Darius: Early bully — win lane before minute 14
summary.Garen: Steady — always strong, no clear spike
summary.Nasus: Hyperscaler off Q stacks. Survive and steamroll
summary.Tryndamere: Spikes at level 6 with ult, splitpush to the end
summary.Kaisa: Spikes with first item, scales well
summary.MissFortune: Bot lane bully, ult always strong
summary.Lulu: Steady enchanter, scales with the ADC
summary.Thresh: Immediate spike, hook = kill from level 1
summary.Nautilus: Strong all-in always, better with CDR
summary.Soraka: Sustain grows with AP, tanky late
summary.Pyke: Spikes at level 6 with ult reset, roams
summary.Janna: Master of disengage, scales with shields
summary.Morgana: Q stun = kill, ult wins fights vs tanks
summary.Briar: Brutal jungle ganker with first item
summary.Warwick: Perfect gank kit early, scales poorly
summary.Graves: Steady, best with first AD item
summary.Kayn: Spikes when his form + first item complete
summary.Nocturne: Ult = kill from level 6 + first item
summary.Mordekaiser: Power spike at 6 with ult, scales well
summary.Gwen: Power farms to items, very strong late
summary.Syndra: Spikes with first item, late assassin
summary.Lucian: Lane bully + early-mid, falls off late
summary.Draven: Snowball ADC — win early or lose late
